message:
fix(clippy): suppress too_many_lines and similar_names lints in tcp/split and typed_symbol

Adds clippy lint suppressions for register_interest (too_many_lines) and
typed_decoder test (similar_names decoder/decoded). Includes vectored
write support for WriteHalf/OwnedWriteHalf and object_params_for_payload
fix for single-block K metadata accuracy.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
